title: Simple Resourcify Datapacks
description: Allows you to change the datapack directory used by Minecraft and Resourcify.
body:
Simple Resourcify Datapacks

Adds a config to change the directory that Resourcify downloads datapacks to, and an option to have Minecraft also scan that directory in the datapacks menu. Includes ingame configuration through the use of Cloth config, as well as path verification. Please alert me if any issues arise. Yes the title is terrible. I'm too deep in the sauce to change it at this point.
